points.text: Practice good personal hygiene, including regular hand washing and covering coughs and sneezes.
Maintain physical or social distancing and avoid close contact with infected individuals.
Use face masks or coverings in public to reduce the spread of COVID-19.
Ensure proper ventilation of indoor spaces to decrease the risk of airborne transmission.
Stay up to date with COVID-19 vaccinations to reduce the risk of infection and severe outcomes.
Stay up to date on your COVID-19 vaccine to prevent serious illness and death.
Ensure good indoor airflow and practice physical distancing to reduce virus spread.
Wear a mask in appropriate settings to help prevent the spread of COVID-19.
Wash your hands well and often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds.
Avoid close contact with anyone who is sick or has symptoms of COVID-19.
Avoid crowded places and maintain at least 1 metre distance from others.
Wear a mask in public places where physical distancing is not possible.
Wash your hands frequently with soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub.
Keep indoor spaces well ventilated to reduce the risk of infection.
Get vaccinated and continue measures to reduce virus spread.
